# Wisdom art — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A promotional and distribution website for an original film, featuring an integrated payment/checkout system for ticket sales or digital access, and links to the film's social media channels. The site is intended to serve as the central hub for the film's marketing and audience engagement.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Wisdom art
A promotional and distribution website for an original film, featuring an integrated payment/checkout system for ticket sales or digital access, and links to the film's social media channels. The site is intended to serve as the central hub for the film's marketing and audience engagement.

## Services/Products
- פרסום הסרט
- מערכת סליקה
- קישורים לרשתות חברתיות

## Target Audience
- קהילת חובבי סרטים
- סטודנטים אומנותיים
- מבקרי קולנוע ובלוגרים

## Industry
קולנוע ובידור

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
